overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial storage room. The character navigates between red metal shelving units filled with containers and equipment in a warm, artificially lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow aisle between industrial storage racks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow aisle between red metal storage shelves filled with ceramic containers

entered.detail: tall red metal rack with multiple shelves holding various containers and equipment
large beige ceramic pots and containers stored on the top shelf
industrial workbench with tools and equipment on the surface
rectangular air ventilation unit mounted on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow aisle in an industrial storage room, flanked by red metal shelving units on the right loaded with ceramic vessels and a metal workbench on the left. The warm artificial lighting casts shadows across the concrete floor as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corridor with stone wall visible ahead

events.description: stone wall becomes visible at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the storage area as the left side opens up and a stone wall comes into view ahead

entered.detail: rough textured stone wall at the back of the storage room
wooden storage crate sitting on the floor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the storage room, the character approaches a stone wall at the corridor's end while passing a wooden crate on the left. The red metal shelving continues along the right side as the environment transitions from the initial aisle to the back section of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: back area of storage room with workstation

events.description: wooden desk and chair become visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: approaching the back wall of the room where a wooden workstation is set up against the left wall

entered.detail: wooden desk with items and equipment on the surface
office chair positioned in front of the wooden desk

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the back area of the storage room, approaching the stone wall where a wooden desk and chair are visible on the left. The red metal shelving continues along the right side as the character explores the final section of this industrial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial storage aisle that gradually opens into a cluttered back workspace. It begins with the character walking past red metal shelving units loaded with ceramic vessels and a metal workbench, with warm artificial lighting casting deep shadows across the concrete floor. As the character moves deeper into the room, the perspective shifts past a wooden crate while the red shelving continues to line the right side of the corridor. The scene then expands as the character reaches the end of the aisle, approaching a stone wall where the environment transitions into a final storage area. The movement concludes by revealing a wooden desk and chair positioned against the wall, marking the furthest point of the industrial space.
